mapper.sql: id, start_time, end_time, in_people, out_people, create_time
mapper.select: select sum(in_people) inPeople,sum(out_people) outPeople from panda_flow where create_time like #{dayTime}"%"
mapper.insert: insert into panda_flow (id, start_time, end_time, in_people, out_people, create_time) values(#{id},#{startTime},#{endTime},#{inPeople},#{outPeople},#{createTime})
mapper.select: select sum(in_people) from panda_flow where create_time like #{dayTime}"%"
